name: Trump Accounts Contribution Pilot Program

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have a qualifying child born after 12/31/2024 and before 1/1/2029 who is a U.S. citizen and has a Social Security Number.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a $1,000 deemed tax payment (refundable credit) for each eligible child born between 2025 and 2028, which is deposited directly into a designated 'Trump account' for the child.
